caption: A video gameplay screen for "ULTIMATE TEAM" features the player profile of "TAYSOM HILL," a "R7 TE" with an overall rating of "95." The screen displays a dark purple interface with various menus and stats, including "HOME," "ATTRIBUTES," and "UPGRADES." A man with blonde hair is visible in a small inset camera feed at the bottom, wearing a black shirt and sitting in front of a decorated Christmas tree. He navigates the "SELECT AN ABILITY" menu, focusing on the "TE APPRENTICE" ability, which is described as providing "Four additional hot routes when lined up at TE." As the scene progresses, the interface shifts to show "SUPERSTAR X-FACTOR & ABILITIES" and "CHEMISTRIES & POSITIONS." The final screen shows an "ABILITY SLOT" marked with a large plus sign and the instruction "Select to add a new Ability to this player," while the player's avatar remains prominently displayed.
